data.title: The U.S. Department of Labor will release the unemployment rate and non-farm data at 20:30, and Powell will speak on the economic outlook at 23:25
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Department of Labor will release the U.S. unemployment rate and seasonally adjusted non-farm payrolls data for March at 20:30 Beijing time tonight.
In addition, Federal Reserve Chairman Powell will deliver a keynote speech on the economic outlook at 23:25 tonight.

data.title: Binance Updates Launchpool and BNB Page
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance announced the upgrade of Launchpool and BNB pages, aiming to help users track and participate in token airdrop activities more conveniently. The upgraded Launchpool page has added a push notification function and integrated HODLer airdrop information; the BNB page provides an overview of airdrop opportunities and instructions for BNB holders. Users can automatically participate in various airdrop activities by depositing BNB into the BinanceEarn product. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Bitget obtains El Salvador Digital Asset Service Provider (DASP) license, completing dual-license compliance layout
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Recently, the National Digital Asset Commission of El Salvador (CNAD) granted Bitget a Digital Asset Service Provider (DASP) license. After obtaining the Bitcoin Service Provider (BSP) license in 2024, Bitget's local compliance layout has been further expanded, and it has become the world's third mainstream crypto exchange to obtain dual licenses after Binance and Bitfinex.
Obtaining the dual licenses of DASP and BSP means that Bitget can legally carry out one-stop digital asset services such as spot and derivatives trading, staking, and income products in El Salvador. At the same time, the new license also covers infrastructure products such as crypto savings and investments, further enhancing the convenience and asset security of users participating in Web3.
Hon Ng, Chief Legal Officer of Bitget, said: "We are always committed to expanding our business in countries with clear regulatory frameworks and providing quality services to our users. This recognition by CNAD is an important step in Bitget's global compliance strategy. El Salvador is forward-looking and transparent in digital asset regulation, which is very attractive to Web3 companies that are developing in compliance. In the future, we will continue to support markets with clear regulatory systems and promote the steady development of the crypto economy."

data.title: Coinbase Derivatives prepares to launch XRP and nano XRP futures on April 21
data.description:
Crypto exchange Coinbase Derivatives has filed with the CFTC to launch XRP and nano XRP futures, aiming to go live on April 21.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349591/coinbase-xrp-futures-filings?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Bitwise’s Crypto ETF Strategy Amid Market Turmoil
data.description:
Bitwise Asset Management launched a Crypto ETF collection of three new actively managed products to its existing portfolio. The funds apply covered call strategies using volatile crypto-related stocks to produce revenue. The funds strive to merge market risk exposure with regular monthly distributions for crypto-related investments
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/04/bitwises-crypto-etf-strategy-amid-market-turmoil/

data.title: 10-Year Dormant Bitcoin Stirs: 1,000 BTC Moved, What’s Next?
data.description:
Decade-old dormant Bitcoin awakens. More than 1,000 BTC suddenly shift on the blockchain after sitting untouched for up to ten years. The move sends ripples through the market, leaving analysts and traders asking: what happens next? The significant on-chain movement was flagged by the blockchain analytics platform CryptoQuant this week. Its data tracked a transaction involving 1,057 Bitcoin that had not been moved for a period between 7 and 10 years
source: https://news.shib.io/2025/04/04/10-year-dormant-bitcoin-stirs-1000-btc-moved-whats-next/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=10-year-dormant-bitcoin-stirs-1000-btc-moved-whats-next

data.title: BNB Chain Most Valuable Builders announces the ninth season's shortlist: 16 early projects selected, and the offline event in Hong Kong kicks off on April 5
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News April 4, 2025 - BNB Chain, together with YZi Labs and CMC Labs, officially announced the 16 selected projects for the ninth season of the Most Valuable Builder (MVB) Acceleration Program. This season's theme focuses on tracks such as AI, DeFi, and DePIN. The selected teams will participate in a four-week intensive incubation and have the opportunity to obtain investment support from YZi Labs.
Key Events: Offline Opening Meeting in Hong Kong (April 5-6)
•Time: April 5-6 (concurrently with Hong Kong Web3 Festival and BNB Super Meetup)
•Highlights: The project party will communicate face-to-face with industry mentors, investors and the BNB Chain core team to discuss the key challenges of early Web3 projects (such as token economic design, financing strategies, etc.).
The 16 selected projects are:
AI
• BitGPT: Decentralized AI Agent Network
• Datai Network: On-chain AI provides structured data layer
• Echopy: BNB on-chain AI portfolio optimizer
• Eurexa AI: The first on-chain tokenization platform for robotics
• Everlyn: High-speed Web3 video generation tool
• JoJoWorld: Decentralized 3D spatial data platform
• Super Protocol: Collaborative confidential AI market
• TermiX: AI-driven Web3 operating system
DeFi
• BitFi: Native BTC interest-bearing CeDeFi solution
• LIKWID: Permissionless, oracle margin trading protocol
DePIN
• XPIN: AI-driven consumer-grade DePIN platform
DeSci
• Stadium Science: Prediction market platform to accelerate scientific research
• Citadel Labs: Deep tech project launch platform
Games and Entertainment
• Oneverse: Southeast Asia's top Web2 game market
• TCOM Global: AI+Web3 decentralized IP protocol
Infrastructure
• Pieverse: A decentralized protocol for reconstructing the human attention economy
Sarah S, head of business development at BNB Chain, said: "MVB provides a key bridge for early teams to connect to industry resources, and we look forward to supporting projects with long-term potential through incubation."
